system.description:
Play the Agent if you want to deceive your opponents and strike at the most opportune moments. Gain access to the Codex domain.

Foundation Features

Decoy: When you become Cloaked, create a stationary decoy that looks like you and is convincing from Close range and further. While the Decoy is active, you can spend a Hope to stay Cloaked even when you end your move in line of sight. The decoy deactivates when it takes damage, is out of range, or when you create a new Decoy.

I'm In: You gain Advantage on bypassing security systems and handling evidence, such as falsifying security logs, using cameras, finding or deleting footage, and setting off alarms.

Specialization Features

Superposition: You may mark a Stress to swap your position with your Tactical Decoy, switching the target of any attacks. Additionally, you may immediately move a Close range when you become Cloaked.

Expertise: When you add an experience, you may mark a Stress instead of spending Hope to double the bonus.

Mastery Feature

Pass without Trace: Once per rest, when you become Cloaked, you may spend any amount of Hope to make an additional ally in Close range also Cloaked for each Hope spent.
